data.title: BingX and John Terry partner at TOKEN2049 Singapore, a top crypto event; BingX as Title Sponsor; notable for Web3 AI tech.
data.description: Panama City, October 10, 2025 - BingX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3 AI company, concluded its significant participation at TOKEN2049 Singapore, the biggest crypto event globally, where it served as a Title Sponsor. Over the course of two days, BingX demonstrated its position as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Alibaba's Joe Tsai challenges US on AI 'race', emphasizing cooperation over competition. Read more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The Chairman of Alibaba Group Holding Ltd, Joe Tsai, recently commented on the U.S.-China competition in AI. Tsai suggested that the U.S. should reconsider its approach to the race. Speaking on the All-In podcast, Tsai highlighted the importance of a strategic and long-term perspective on AI, rather than solely focusing on winning. This contrasts with the views of David Sacks, the White House AI and Crypto Czar, who emphasized the need for the U.S. to emerge as the most powerful country by winning the AI race. Tsai countered this by stating that there is no clear victory in this race, likening it to a prolonged marathon. For more details, the entire story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AJLI launches 'Every Woman. All Things.' Initiative on World Mental Health Day to address women's mental load. #AJLI #MentalHealth #EveryWomanAllThings
data.description: On October 10, 2025, in New York, the Association of Junior Leagues International (AJLI) announced the start of a significant national effort called Every Woman. All Things. This initiative is set to debut on World Mental Health Day and aims to raise awareness on issues that are frequently overlooked.

data.title: FISG named as one of the Best MT4 Forex Brokers of 2025 by FXStreet, highlighting their excellence in technology and market expertise.
data.description: In Limassol, Cyprus, on October 10, 2025, FISG was honored as one of the top MetaTrader 4 (MT4) Forex Brokers for 2025 by FXStreet. This accolade highlights the company's outstanding performance in technology-based trading solutions and extensive knowledge of the global markets.

data.title: Gold Reserve Ltd files disqualification motion against Special Master's advisors in Citgo sale, involving Weil and Evercore.
data.description: Gold Reserve Ltd. has recently taken action by filing a motion to disqualify the professional advisors to the Special Master appointed by the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware. The company, listed as TSX.V: GRZ, BSX: GRZ.BH, OTCQX: GDRZF, has moved to disqualify the law firm Weil, Gotshal & Manges LLP and the investment banking firm Evercore, Inc. This motion is in compliance with the court's schedule and involves the Special Master Robert B. Pincus.

data.title: YD Bio Partner EG Biomed achieves CAP Accreditation for its CLIA-certified laboratory in Bothell, WA. (#YDES)
data.description: Today in Taipei, Taiwan, YD Bio Limited revealed that its business associate, EG Biomed US Inc., has obtained accreditation from the College of American Pathologists' Laboratory Accreditation Program. EG Biomed, a licensing collaborator of YD Bio for pancreatic and breast cancer detection, as well as working with 3D Global on eye disorder treatments, was awarded this recognition for its CLIA-certified laboratory in Bothell, Washington, under Certificate #50D2316600. YD Bio is renowned for its developments in DNA methylation-based cancer detection and ophthalmologic advancements. Additionally, YD Bio trades on the Nasdaq under the symbol YDES.
